---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: false
    number_sections: true
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(xtable)
library(stringr) # For str_remove and strcat (if pracma is not used)
library(reshape2) # For cast()
library(this.path)
setwd(this.path::this.dir())

data <- readRDS("../tmp/price_impact/regression_contemp/fm_stdev.RDS")[type == "OFI"]
data[, se := se_nw][, se_nw := NULL] # use NW standard errors

# choose specification and variables
data[, type_idx := ifelse(type == "BMI", 1, ifelse(type == "FIT", 2, 3))]
data <- data[var %in% paste0("ofi_bin", 1:3)]

# variable names
data[, var_lab := var]
data[, var_lab := gsub("ofi_bin1", "M_\\{\\|d_{n,t}| < \\\\sigma\\}", var_lab)]
data[, var_lab := gsub("ofi_bin2", "M_\\{\\|d_{n,t}| \\\\in \\[\\\\sigma, 2\\\\sigma\\]\\}", var_lab)]
data[, var_lab := gsub("ofi_bin3", "M_\\{\\|d_{n,t}| > 2 \\\\sigma\\}", var_lab)]
data[, var_lab := paste0("$", var_lab, "$")]

# choose regression specifications
data <- data[spec_idx %in% 1:3]
tmp <- unique(data[, .(spec_idx, type_idx)])[order(type_idx, spec_idx)]
tmp[, reg_idx := 1:nrow(tmp)]
data <- merge(data, tmp, by = c("type_idx", "spec_idx"))[, spec_idx := NULL]
rm(tmp)

# rank variables
data[, var_idx := as.integer(sub("ofi_bin", "", var))]

# also get shock sizes
shock_data <- readRDS("../tmp/raw_data/reg_inputs/reg_table_static.RDS")[type == "OFI"]
shock_data <- shock_data[, .(coef = mean(abs(ofi)), se = as.numeric(NA)), bin][order(bin)][, var_idx := 1:3]
# shock_data[, var_lab := rep("", 3)]
shock_data[, var_lab := c("$E(d | |d_{n,t}| < \\sigma))$", "$E(d | |d_{n,t}| \\in [\\sigma, 2\\sigma])$", "$E(d | |d_{n,t}| > 2 \\sigma)$")]

# get implied cumulative price effects
tmp <- copy(data[, .(reg_idx, var, var_lab, coef, se)])
tmp[, bin := as.integer(sub("ofi_bin", "", var))]
tmp <- merge(tmp, shock_data[, .(bin, shock_size = coef)], by = "bin")
tmp[, coef := coef * shock_size]
tmp[, se := se * shock_size]
# tmp[bin == 1, var_lab := "$M_{|d_{n,t}| < \\sigma} \\cdot E(d ~|~ |d_{n,t}| < \\sigma)$"]
# tmp[bin == 2, var_lab := "$M_{|d_{n,t}| \\in [\\sigma, 2\\sigma]} \\cdot E(d ~|~ |d_{n,t}| \\in [\\sigma, 2\\sigma])$"]
# tmp[bin == 3, var_lab := "$M_{|d_{n,t}| > 2 \\sigma} \\cdot E(d ~|~ |d_{n,t}| > 2 \\sigma)$"]
tmp[, var_lab := ""]
tmp[, c("shock_size", "bin") := NULL]
tmp[, var_idx := as.integer(gsub("ofi_bin", "", var))]
cum_data <- copy(tmp)


# add stars to coefficients
cuts <- abs(qnorm(c(.01, .05, .1) / 2))
data[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
cum_data[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
shock_data[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]

data[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
cum_data[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
shock_data[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]

data[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.2f", coef))]
cum_data[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.3f", coef))]
shock_data[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.3f", coef))]

data[, ss_lab := sapply(data[, ss], function(x) {
  ifelse(x > 0,
    # paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
    paste0("^{", strrep("*", x), "}$"),
    "$"
  )
})]
cum_data[, ss_lab := sapply(cum_data[, ss], function(x) {
  ifelse(x > 0,
    # paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
    paste0("^{", strrep("*", x), "}$"),
    "$"
  )
})]

data[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
cum_data[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
shock_data[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, "$")]

data[, se_lab := paste0("$(", sprintf("%.2f", round(se, 2)), ")$")]
cum_data[, se_lab := paste0("$(", sprintf("%.3f", round(se, 2)), ")$")]
shock_data[, se_lab := ""]

# --- put together regression results


# first group
est <- dcast(data[, .(var_idx, reg_idx, coef_lab)], var_idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "coef_lab") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number(), type = "coef")

se <- dcast(data[, .(var_idx, reg_idx, se_lab)], var_idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "se_lab") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 1, type = "se")
var_labels <- unique(data[, .(var_idx, var_lab)])

tbl <- bind_rows(est, se) %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(var_labels, by = "var_idx") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_idx = var_lab) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_lab = NULL) %>%
  dplyr::rename(var_lab = var_idx) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(group_id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_lab = ifelse(type == "se", "", var_lab)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = NULL, type = NULL)
rm(est, se, var_labels)

# second group
shock_data[, reg_idx := 1]
est <- dcast(shock_data[, .(var_idx, reg_idx, coef_lab)], var_idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "coef_lab") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 2, type = "coef")
se <- dcast(shock_data[, .(var_idx, reg_idx, se_lab)], var_idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "se_lab") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 3, type = "se")
var_labels <- unique(shock_data[, .(var_idx, var_lab)])
tbl2 <- bind_rows(est, se) %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(var_labels, by = "var_idx") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_idx = var_lab) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_lab = NULL) %>%
  dplyr::rename(var_lab = var_idx) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(group_id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_lab = ifelse(type == "se", "", var_lab)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = NULL, type = NULL) %>%
  select(-var_lab)
rm(est, se, var_labels)

# third group
est <- dcast(cum_data[, .(var_idx, reg_idx, coef_lab)], var_idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "coef_lab") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 2, type = "coef")
se <- dcast(cum_data[, .(var_idx, reg_idx, se_lab)], var_idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "se_lab") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 3, type = "se")
var_labels <- unique(cum_data[, .(var_idx, var_lab)])
tbl3 <- bind_rows(est, se) %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(var_labels, by = "var_idx") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_idx = var_lab) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_lab = NULL) %>%
  dplyr::rename(var_lab = var_idx) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(group_id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_lab = ifelse(type == "se", "", var_lab)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = NULL, type = NULL)
rm(est, se, var_labels)

tbl <- bind_cols(tbl, tbl2, tbl3)
rm(tbl2, tbl3)

# note controls
ctrls <- data.table(var_lab = "Predictor controls", t(c("N", "Y", "Y", "", "", "", "", "")))
ctrls <- rbind(ctrls, data.table(var_lab = "Liquidity controls", t(c("N", "N", "Y", "", "", "", "", ""))))
names(ctrls) <- names(tbl)
tbl <- bind_rows(tbl, ctrls)
rm(ctrls)


# add col columns
col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", "(1)", "(2)", "(3)", "(4)", "", "(1b)", "(2b)", "(3b)"))))
names(col_names) <- names(tbl)
tbl <- bind_rows(col_names, tbl)
rm(col_names)

align_vector <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", ncol(tbl) - 1), collapse = ""))
x.side <- xtable(tbl, align = align_vector)

this_add_to_row <- list(
  pos = list(-1, nrow(tbl)),
  command = c(
    "\\toprule & \\multicolumn{3}{c}{Multiplier ($M_R$)} & $E(|d| | R)$ & \\multicolumn{4}{c}{Cumulative impact ($M_R \\cdot E(|d| | R)$)} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-4} \\cmidrule(l){5-5} \\cmidrule(l){6-9} \\vspace{5pt} \n",
    "\\bottomrule"
  )
)

print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row
)

to_dir <- "../output/tables/"
dir.create(to_dir, showWarnings = F, recursive = T)
print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
  file = paste0(to_dir, "reg_static_fm_stdev_ofi_cumulative.tex")
)
```
